title.en: Checking the Weather Before You Go

phrases.en: Dan will pick up his phone and open the weather app.
phrases.zh: 丹会拿起手机，打开天气应用。

phrases.en: He will tap on today's hourly forecast.
phrases.zh: 他会点开今天的每小时预报。

phrases.en: He will read that the morning will be cold and cloudy.
phrases.zh: 他会看到早上会又冷又阴。

phrases.en: He will see that heavy rain will start around noon.
phrases.zh: 他会看到中午前后会开始下大雨。

phrases.en: He will check the high and low temperatures carefully.
phrases.zh: 他会仔细查看最高温和最低温。

phrases.en: He will decide that the day will feel chilly and wet.
phrases.zh: 他会判断今天会又冷又潮湿。

phrases.en: He will walk over to his closet and look inside.
phrases.zh: 他会走到衣柜前往里看。

phrases.en: He will choose a warm waterproof jacket to wear.
phrases.zh: 他会挑一件保暖防水的外套穿。

phrases.en: He will grab a sturdy umbrella from the stand by the door.
phrases.zh: 他会从门边的伞架上拿一把结实的雨伞。

phrases.en: He will put on thick socks and his rain boots.
phrases.zh: 他会穿上厚袜子和雨靴。

phrases.en: He will wrap a soft scarf snugly around his neck.
phrases.zh: 他会把一条柔软的围巾舒服地绕在脖子上。

phrases.en: He will slip the umbrella into the side of his bag.
phrases.zh: 他会把雨伞插进包的侧袋里。

phrases.en: He will glance outside one more time to be sure.
phrases.zh: 他会再往外看一眼，以防万一。

phrases.en: Then he will step out the door, ready for the rain.
phrases.zh: 然后他会走出家门，做好淋雨的准备。
